text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > HIV Testing * LGBTQ2+ Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Transgender Individuals No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT PRISM HEALTH PIVOT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sexual health services that include HIV and STI testing. 2236 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or trans Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 279-7033 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT PIVOT
